<!--
This PR MERGE-COMMITS by default — the branch's curated commits land on `main` alongside a merge
commit, and the title (Conventional-Commit-shaped) + this body carry the narrative that travels
with them. So this description tells the slice's story; the commit messages are the granular audit
trail beside it. Tell it well. Curate the branch and clear the Definition of Done before merge —
the rules live in docs/ (git-and-pr-workflow, definition-of-done). Don't restate them here; just
tell what changed and confirm the gate + adversarial QA passed.
-->
